description: The PhotoCaptureManager component is used to manage the finger photo capture ability for users and what settings to use for it.

fields.FingerGestureEnabled: Whether the finger photo gesture can be used or not.
fields.MinDistance: The distance from the view to use for minimum FOV point.
fields.MaxDistance: The distance from the view to use for maximum FOV point.
fields.MinFOV: The minimum FOV that can be achieved by moving the finger photo closer to the viewpoint.
fields.MaxFOV: The maximum FOV that can be achieved by moving the finger photo further from the viewpoint.
fields.PreviewResolution: The resolution of the texture shown on the preview graphic.
fields.NormalResolution: The resolution of the picture taken normally.
fields.TimerResolution: The resolution of the picture taken via camera.
fields.CaptureStereo: Whether the finger photo should capture a 3D photo.
fields.StereoSeparation: How much to separate the L and R "eye" positions for the camera capture.
fields.TimerSeconds: How many seconds the finger photo timer should be.
fields.HideAllNameplates: Whether to hide all nameplates for taking the photo.
fields.EncodeFormat: What format to encode the resulting picture in.
fields.DebugGesture: Whether to debug the user's gesture angles/position for achieving a valid finger photo gesture position.
fields._timerStart: What time the last timer started at.
fields._timerActive: Whether the timer is currently going or not.
fields._originalParent: The original parent of this manager.
fields._originalPosition: The original position of this manager.
fields._originalRotation: The original rotation of this manager.
fields._originalScale: The original scale of this manager.
fields._root: The root of this entire finger photo manager.
fields._previewRoot: The slot that is the root of the preview graphic.
fields._renderTex: The texture being used for the preview render graphic.
fields._quad: The quad to render the preview with.
fields._frame: The frame mesh being used for the preview graphic.
fields._cameraRoot: The slot being used for the camera's transforms.
fields._cameraPos: The position field of the camera.
fields._cameraRot: The rotation field of the camera.
fields._frameMaterial: The material being used for the frame visual for the preview graphic.
fields._timerTextRoot: The root slot of the visual being used for the timer text.
fields._timerText: The component being used to display the timer text.
fields._shutterClip: The audio to play when a photo is taken.
fields._timerStartClip: The audio to play when the timer starts.
fields._timerCountdownSlowPlayer: The audio to play when the timer has plenty of time left.
fields._timerCountdownFastPlayer: The audio to play when the timer is close to being finished.
fields._timerCountdownSlowOutput: The audio output component outputting the timer has plenty of time sound.
fields._timerCountdownFastOutput: The audio output component outputting the timer is close to being done sound.
fields._timerRoot: The root slot of the entire timer visual and mechanism.

usage: Not used directly by the user. auto generated.
